title: The Rajiv Gandhi Institute of Petroleum Technology Act, 2007
full_text: The Rajiv Gandhi Institute of Petroleum Technology Act, 2007 राजीव गांधी पेट्रोलियम प्रौद्योगिकी संस्थावन अधिनियम, 2007 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 200754 Act Number: 54 Enactment Date: 2007-12-20 Act Year: 2007 Short Title: The Rajiv Gandhi Institute of Petroleum Technology Act, 2007 Hindi Title: राजीव गांधी पेट्रोलियम प्रौद्योगिकी संस्थावन अधिनियम, 2007 Long Title: An Act to declare the institution known as the Rajiv Gandhi Institute of Petroleum Technology to be an institution of national importance and to provide for its incorporation and for matters connected therewith. Ministry: Ministry of Petroleum and Natural Gas Notification: yet to be notified TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles Show all section The Rajiv Gandhi Institute of Petroleum Technology Act, 2007 CHAPTER I PRELIMINARY CHAPTER II THE INSTITUTE CHAPTER III MISCELLANEOUS Section 1. Short title and commencement. Show Related Subordinates Section 2. Declaration of Rajiv Gandhi Institute of Petroleum Technology as an institution of national importance. Section 3. Definitions. Section 4. Incorporation of Institute. Show Related Subordinates Section 5. Constitution of Board of Governors. Section 6. Term of office of, vacancies among, and allowances payable to, members of Board. Show Related Subordinates Section 7. Vesting of properties. Section 8. Effect of incorporation of Institute. Section 9. Functions of Institute. Section 10. Powers of Board. Section 11. Institute to be open to all races, creeds and classes. Section 12. Teaching at the Institute. Section 13. Visitor. Section 14. Authorities of Institute. Section 15. Establishment of General Council. Section 16. Powers and functions of General Council. Section 17. Senate. Section 18. Functions of Senate. Section 19. President of Board. Section 20. Director. Section 21. Registrar. Section 22. Powers and duties of other authorities and officers. Section 23. Grants by Central Government. Section 24. Fund of Institute. Section 25. Setting up of endowment fund. Section 26. Accounts and audit. Section 27. Pension and provident fund. Section 28. Appointments. Section 29. Statutes. Section 30. Statutes how made. Section 31. Ordinances. Section 32. Ordinances how made. Section 33. Conduct of business by authorities of Institute. Section 34. Tribunal of Arbitration. Section 35. Acts and proceedings not to be invalidated by vacancies. Section 36. Grant of degrees, etc., by Institute. Section 37. Sponsored schemes. Section 38. Power to remove difficulties. Section 39. Transitional provisions. Section 40. Statutes, Ordinances and notifications to be published in the Official Gazette and to be laid before Parliament.
